header.description: Bf 109 F-4 holds wings level, pulls a brief g>1 to rotate the nose up into a climb, then relaxes to ~1 g and coasts the earned flight-path angle up from 7800 m into the ceiling. B2: climb is now EARNED (alt_dot = V*sin gamma), not a commanded rate. Exercises the ATM_TOP soft-band predamp (7900-8000 m) on the emergent vertical rate, which asymptotically caps altitude just below 8000 m without overshoot (the predamp scales the climb rate to zero as alt->8000). gamma stays well inside +/-90 deg. TAS 80 m/s in the bf109f4 LUT domain.
